_note: The six SAIS forecast regions. lat/lon are INDICATIVE region anchor points (each pinned to the region's best-known summit) for drawing the cheap circle overlay — they are NOT survey data and the circle radius makes precision non-critical. Proper region GeoJSON boundaries are a later nicety (see Phase 5 scope). slug = the path on sais.gov.uk. Cross-check anchors against peaks.json (DoBIH) if ever in doubt.
